description: Wixie prompt-crafter hooks — auto-run convergence after prompt file writes

hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE=$(jq -r ".tool_input.file_path // empty"); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q "prompts/.*/prompt\."; then echo "[Wixie] Prompt saved: $FILE — convergence engine will optimize automatically" >&2; fi; exit 0'
